title: RAID Row
description: One row of a RAID log (Risks, Assumptions, Issues, Dependencies). Rows are schema-validated so downstream triage and briefs can rely on shape.

title.description: One-line title readable in a table

description.description: 2-4 sentence description — what is the concern and why does it matter

due.description: ISO date for next action. Nullable for items in 'watch' status.

mitigation.description: What we are doing about it. Required when status is 'mitigating'.

trigger.description: What would cause this to become an issue (for Risks only)

assumption_test.description: How we will validate (for Assumptions only)

blocking.description: List of RAID-IDs or ticket-IDs this depends on (for Dependencies only)

last_updated.description: ISO date of last state change

tags.description: Optional tags — program name, workstream, etc.
